blended.narrative: Revelstoke Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
